summary: EXP-405 closes ISS-1344 (SEC-8b.3.c4 hole 3, moderate). Targeted sentence-level rephrase of SEC-8b.3 L3a paragraph 3 closing clause. Replaces "two distinct dome-authored formulas, both outside the W004 cluster" framing of the monitor.py / inject_ai_layer.py pair with the family-relationship framing the curmudgeon recommended: inject_ai_layer.py is acknowledged as a BOU-family variant (BOU × coverage × latitude_factor 0.81), within the dome's own BOU per-station band of −5 to −13 nT but not matching the dome's own Ebro BOU prediction (−10.7 nT, FSF 1.029). monitor.py is now isolated as the genuine outlier (KAPPA applied twice; arithmetic identity −10.9 × 1.672 ≡ −18.22 now stated explicitly). Verification class — no new arguments, no new sub-sections, the KAPPA-twice critique was already present in the text and in PRED-095 detail_reasoning. Also aligns L3a paragraph with the immediately following goalpost-scope paragraph (which already counts only BOU, W004, monitor.py as the three formulas).
